title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at RITES

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at RITES
jsonLd.description:
Join the RITES family as a Logistics Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
